ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2018 Continued To Dec-06-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendants Comstock Sheet Metal, Htng Air Cond., Inc. And Normans Automotive Supply And Machine Shop, Inc.
Off Calendar Dec-05-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Angela Bradstreet. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Michael Espinosa, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Archie Cross, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Comstock Sheet Metal, Htng & Air Cond., Inc. or Norman's Automotive Supply and Machine Shop, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant Comstock Sheet Metal, Htng & Air Cond., Inc. on September 28, 2011.
Statement of Damages as to defendant Comstock Sheet Metal, Htng & Air Cond., Inc. was filed on September 28, 2011.
Default was entered against defendant Norman's Automotive Supply and Machine Shop, Inc. on March 8, 2012.
Statement of Damages as to defendant Norman's Automotive Supply and Machine Shop, Inc. was filed on March 8, 2012.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 4, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Archie Cross and against the Defaulted Defendants Comstock Sheet Metal, Htng & Air Cond., Inc. and Norman's Automotive Supply and Machine Shop, Inc., as follows:

Defendant Comstock Sheet Metal, Htng & Air Cond., Inc:
Economic Damages - $50,000.00.
Non-Economic Damages - $300,000.00.
Total - $350,000.00.

Defendant Norman's Automotive Supply and Machine Shop, Inc:
Economic Damages - $50,000.00.
Non-Economic Damages - $300,000.00.
Total - $350,000.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Associated Insulation Of California
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon , CSR#6840.

Oren P. Noah, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ARCHIE CROSS.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ASSOCIATED INSULATION OF CALIFORNIA.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that the plaintiff ARCHIE CROSS, shall recover damages from defendant ASSOCIATED INSULATION OF CALIFORNIA in the amount of $50,000.00 in Economic Damages, $300,000.00 in Non-Economic Damages, for a total amount of $350,000.00
The judgment shall take effect immediately.
The Clerk is ordered to enter the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
